title: Korean-Style Songpyeon
description: A traditional Korean holiday rice cake filled with sweet fillings, typically steamed over a pot of boiling water.
instructions: Combine rice flour, Korean salt, and sesame oil in a large mixing bowl.
Gradually add in water and mix until a sticky dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into small balls.
Roll out each ball of dough into a thin circle.
Place a small amount of Songpyeon filling in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the filling and shape into a triangle.
Repeat with the remaining dough and filling.
Steam the Songpyeon over a pot of boiling water for 10-15 minutes.
Serve warm and dust with sugar.
